examples: By 2012, this period of chastisement will likely have run its course, and future-mindedness will be back in vogue, for better or worse.

But regret is the beclouding of the mind and not its chastisement.
What factors should the law require the courts to consider when determining "reasonable chastisement"?
The legislation intends to remove the legal defence of "reasonable chastisement" or "reasonable punishment".
